hooks.command: bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.agents/hooks/harness-agent-hook.sh" codex session-start || { echo 'harness-kit hook runner is missing or failed; run harness-kit run-checks and harness-kit verify manually' >&2; exit 2; }

bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.agents/hooks/harness-agent-hook.sh" codex stop || printf '%s\n' '{"decision":"block","reason":"harness-kit hook runner is missing or failed; run harness-kit run-checks and harness-kit verify manually"}'
